name: Lozengegrad
description: Diamonds half in light and half in shadow, the cut turning a quarter-turn on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 98% 50%, 50% 98%, 2% 50%); clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 98% 50%, 50% 98%, 2% 50%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.26); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 98% 50%, 50% 98%); clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 98% 50%, 50% 98%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
